description: Transactional job queue engine for Go. One Driver[TTx] interface covers Postgres, MySQL, SQLite, MongoDB, Redis, Cassandra, ClickHouse, DynamoDB, Firestore, and in-memory. Implements the transactional outbox pattern via EnqueueTx.
rules: Use EnqueueTx (not Enqueue) when inside a database transaction — this is the transactional outbox pattern and guarantees the job appears only if the transaction commits
Use the in-memory driver (driver/memory) and gontest package for tests — no Docker or real database needed
Redis, Cassandra, ClickHouse, and DynamoDB do not support transactional rollback; use Enqueue after commit for these backends
MongoDB requires a replica set — standalone MongoDB will fail at New()
SQLite requires db.SetMaxOpenConns(1) — only one writer allowed
Firestore requires a composite index created manually: collection goncordia_jobs, fields queue ASC + state ASC + run_at ASC
